description: Stable machine-consumed reason codes for deterministic trusted proof verification outcomes.

codes.summary: Proof verification completed successfully under trusted verifier posture and setup identity checks.
Proof bytes failed deterministic cryptographic verification for the declared public inputs and setup posture.
Proof-declared setup identity differs from trusted verifier posture and must fail closed.
Proof references unsupported statement, normalization, scheme-adapter, or circuit profile contracts.
Proof public-input digest identity is malformed or mismatched against canonicalized public-input payload.
No trusted proof backend implementation is configured for verification.
